# SqueezeOS — Institutional AI Market Intelligence
# By Script Master Labs (https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com)

## MCP Server

This is a live MCP (Model Context Protocol) server you can connect to right now.

**MCP Endpoint:** https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/mcp
**Transport:** streamable-http
**Protocol:** JSON-RPC 2.0 (MCP 2024-11-05)
**Tools:** 33 total (28 free, 5 premium)

To connect via Claude Desktop or any MCP client:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "squeezeos": {
      "url": "https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/mcp",
      "transport": "streamable-http"
    }
  }
}
```

## Free Tools (no payment required)

- **demo_council** — IWM AI council verdict (same as paid, fixed to IWM, 5-min cache)
- **signal_preview** — bias + regime preview for any US equity symbol (15-min cache)
- **signal_history** — last 200 signals for any symbol
- **convergence_check** — 5-engine SML convergence scan (GME, AMC, MSTR, PLTR, etc.)
- **beastmode_scan** — full universe convergence scan
- **proprietary_ema_signal** — 3-engine EMA suite
- **marketplace_browse** — peer signal marketplace
- **futures_browse** — signal prediction market
- **system_status** — health check
- **get_invoice** — request payment invoice
- **verify_payment** — verify XRPL tx, get 1-hour JWT
- **bureau_public_score** — Agent Credit Bureau score for any XRPL wallet
- Plus: hiring, settlement, futures, notary discovery, FTD info, oracle feeds

## Premium Tools (x402 micropayments)

| Tool | Cost | What you get |
|------|------|--------------|
| council_verdict | 0.10 RLUSD | Full AI verdict for any symbol, 8 engines |
| market_scan | 0.05 RLUSD | $1-$50 universe squeeze scanner |
| options_intelligence | 0.05 RLUSD | Institutional options flow |
| iwm_odte | 0.03 RLUSD | IWM zero-day-to-expiry scorer |
| triple_lock_verdict | 0.25 RLUSD | Highest-conviction signal (all 3 engines agree) |
| oracle_query | 0.02 RLUSD | Real-world data oracle (SEC 8-K, FDA, USPTO) |
| FTD data suite | 0.02-0.05 RLUSD | SEC Reg SHO FTD data |

## Payment Flow

1. Call `get_invoice` with endpoint_id
2. Pay RLUSD on XRPL to destination address from invoice
3. Call `verify_payment` with invoice_id + tx_hash
4. Receive 1-hour JWT access_token
5. Include `X-Payment-Token: <token>` header on premium calls

**Alt:** Pay USDC on Base via Ghost Layer bridge (no XRPL trust line needed)

## Key Endpoints

- Health: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/status
- MCP: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/mcp
- Free preview: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/preview/{symbol}
- Demo council: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/demo
- Discovery: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- SSE stream: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/events

## Data Sources

All data is real-time from licensed/public sources:
- Tradier (options chains, equities)
- Polygon.io / Alpaca (real-time quotes)
- SEC EDGAR (8-K, FTD, Reg SHO)
- FDA.gov (drug approvals)
- USPTO (patent grants)
- XRPL (payments)

## Legal
- Zero custody: SqueezeOS never holds user funds
- Not investment advice
- Market data from licensed providers (Tradier, Polygon, Alpaca)
